emails.subject: Re: FW: FW: Get Together This Coming Tuesday?
emails.body: Re: FW: FW: Get Together This Coming Tuesday? Kim, I talked to Dale early this morning and suggested that we meet during his next trip to Houston when we decide on timing of our project. Vince
